title: All Curiosities About DGS (Vertical Transfer Exam)
content:
All Curiosities About DGS (Vertical Transfer Exam)

VERTICAL TRANSFER EXAM

Graduates of Üsküdar University associate degree programs, who are placed in undergraduate programs that are the continuation of associate degree programs with the Vertical Transfer Exam (DGS), can start their education from the 3rd grade by counting many courses they take in the associate degree program thanks to the integration of their curricula.

1- Which candidates are eligible to apply for the Vertical Transfer Exam?

All candidates who will graduate and graduate in the associate degree program can apply to DGS.

2- Is there any limitation in taking the Vertical Transfer Exam or how many times can exams be taken?

There is no limitation on the number of exams after the exam entry conditions are met.

3- Between which dates are preferences made?

Preference procedures will be made within the date range announced by ÖSYM.

4- What kind of a path should be followed in Vertical Transfer preferences?

Preferences will be made in accordance with the Preference Guide to be published by ÖSYM.

5- How many preferences do I have in the Vertical Transfer Exam, do I have to fill my entire preference list?

Preferences will be made in accordance with the Preference Guide to be published by ÖSYM.

6- If I win Üsküdar University, from which grade will I start and how will my course exemption procedures be done?

Candidates who are placed with the Vertical Transfer Examination are exempted from the courses / courses accepted by the relevant faculty for the course equivalencies of the courses they have been successful in higher education programs during their associate degree education or in higher education programs they have previously studied, and their adjustment to the 3rd grade is made.

Candidate students who have more courses to be responsible for after the exemption process and who are unable to complete the program within the normal education period can apply to the relevant faculty secretariat with a petition to start from the 2nd grade until the last day of the fall semester course registration procedures.

When graduates of Üsküdar University associate degree programs are placed in undergraduate programs that are the continuation of their associate degree programs with the Vertical Transfer Examination (DGS), they can start their education from the 3rd grade by counting many courses taken in the associate degree program thanks to the integration of the curricula of the programs.

While transferring the courses taken during associate degree education, Üsküdar University

Exemption, Course Equivalency, Grade Transfer and Adjustment Procedures

are carried out according to

the Directive

.

7-Will the exempted courses affect my GPA?

The undergraduate grade point averages of students who are currently enrolled in undergraduate programs with vertical transfer are calculated on the basis of the courses taken in the associate degree program and the courses taken during undergraduate education.

8- What are the scholarship opportunities for candidates who are placed to Üsküdar University with the Vertical Transfer Exam?

An additional discount is given to those who are graduates of Üsküdar University SHMYO among the students who are enrolled in the programs of Üsküdar University that take students with DGS with a 50% discount by OSYM.
